evidence: "Horror movies are my favorite and this movie is the best horror movie I have seen in a long time."
"This was a really nice documentary about Chris McCandless."
"There were several stories going throughout the movie and were poorly tied up in the end."
"I really liked that I couldn't figure out the ending until closer to the end or how everything would tie in together."
"It moved super slow, but was scary during a few parts of the movie."
"It does go a little slow, but I really am enjoying listening to Becky."
"The director and behind-the-scenes people did some amazing work on a few episodes that I think is worth noting."
"The acting was okay, but it did seem to get better later on in the movie."
"I have been a die-hard House fan since it came out a few years ago."
"I love Glenn Close and Gemma Arterton and the main actor is wonderful."
"Seeing the footage of her, so slender, a skeleton, was heartbreaking."
"It was a tragic story of a young woman who suffered from anorexia."
"This movie was so powerful. It was full of emotions and the story line was good."

summary: The user has a strong preference for horror, thriller, and emotional narratives, often appreciating high production quality. They enjoy complex storytelling but have mixed feelings about pacing, sometimes favoring slower, character-driven narratives. Overall, they value emotional impact and sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
